name: Only Girl in Guy Asylum
description:
Welcome to Crotus, a dark haunted asylum with crazy people in it and thrilling events. As the only girl in a guys asylum, you’re both valued and targeted from the start!

For this one, you can take the story in a ton of directions because I added a ton of details. You can make it character focused and interact with one or multiple of the many crazy but fun guys with unique backstories, or try to explore the asylum and its many secrets, or even try to escape the asylum and enter the eerie forest filled with cryptids on your escape! Or maybe try to take over the asylum?

Female inmates/MalePOV
creator: Tevin Anarchy
